topic: writing and evaluating algebraic expressions from word problems
latex:
Admission to a local fair is \$10.00 for each adult and \$6.00 for each child. Each ride costs \$1.50 for an adult and \$1.00 for a child.

\textbf{a.} Write an expression that represents how much more an adult will spend at the fair when they go on $r$ rides.

\textbf{b.} An adult and a child each go on 7 rides. How much more did the adult spend?
